recommendations.title: George of the Jungle 2
recommendations.overview: George and Ursula now have a son, George Junior, so Ursula's mother arrives to try and take them back to "civilization".

recommendations.title: 4L
recommendations.overview: To find Joseba, a dying friend, and see him reunite with his daughter Ely, two old friends, Jean Pierre and Tocho, embark with her on a road trip through the Sahara desert, from Spain to Mali.

recommendations.title: The Pink Panther

recommendations.title: Book Club: The Next Chapter
recommendations.overview: Four best friends take their book club to Italy for the fun girls' trip they never had. When things go off the rails and secrets are revealed, their relaxing vacation turns into a once-in-a-lifetime cross-country adventure.

recommendations.title: Star Wars: Episode II - Attack of the Clones
recommendations.overview: Following an assassination attempt on Senator Padmé Amidala, Jedi Knights Anakin Skywalker and Obi-Wan Kenobi investigate a mysterious plot into the heart of the Separatist movement and the beginning of the Clone Wars.

recommendations.overview: With the Griffins stuck again at home during a blackout, Peter tells the story of “Star Wars Episode VI: Return of the Jedi.”

recommendations.title: Forever My Girl
recommendations.overview: After being gone for a decade, a country star returns home to the love he left behind.
